sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: UPS는 전략적 물량 감축과 네트워크 효율화로 매출 886억 6,100만 달러를 기록하며 수익성 방어에 집중하고 있습니다.

keyPoints.text: 물량 감소 전략의 일환으로 통합 매출액은 줄었으나, 개당 매출(revenue per piece)은 6.6% 증가하며 수익성 개선을 도모했습니다.
미국 내 중소기업(SMB) 고객 비중을 전체 물량의 30% 이상으로 확대하며 포트폴리오 다변화를 추진 중입니다.

riskChanges.text: 항공유 및 디젤 등 연료 가격 변동성이 운영 비용에 직접적인 영향을 미치며, 유가 상승 시 이를 상쇄할 할증료 유지 여부가 핵심 리스크입니다.
연료 가격 변동 위험을 헤지 전략으로 완화하려 노력하고 있으나, 이러한 전략이 실제 비용 상승을 완전히 방어할 수 있다는 보장은 없습니다.

businessChanges.text: 네트워크 재구성(Network Reconfiguration) 및 효율성 제고(Efficiency Reimagined) 이니셔티브를 통해 자동화와 분류 시설 통합을 진행하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025 회계연도 매출은 886억 6,100만 달러, 영업이익은 78억 6,700만 달러를 기록했습니다.
순이익은 55억 7,200만 달러이며, 총자산은 730억 9,000만 달러, 현금및현금성자산은 58억 8,700만 달러를 보유하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 최대 고객사 물량 축소에 따른 매출 감소를 고수익 SMB 고객 유치와 개당 단가 인상으로 얼마나 효과적으로 상쇄할 수 있을지가 향후 수익성 회복의 관건입니다.

Financial Risks Changing fuel and energy prices, including gasoline, diesel and jet fuel, and interruptions in supplies of these commodities could materially adversely affect us. Fuel and energy costs have a significant impact on our operations. We require significant quantities of fuel for our aircraft and delivery vehicles and are exposed to the risks associated with variations in the market price for petroleum products, including gasoline, diesel and jet fuel. We seek to mitigate our exposure to changing fuel prices through pricing strategies and have in the past and may in the future utilize hedging transactions. There can be no assurance that these strategies will be effective. If we are unable to maintain or increase our fuel surcharges, higher fuel costs could materially adversely impact our operating results. Even if we can offset changes in fuel costs with surcharges, high fuel

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations in our Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2024 filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission on February 18, 2025. Overview In 2025, we continued to execute our Customer First, People Led and Innovation Driven strategy, which focuses on growing in the parts of the market that value our end-to-end solutions, including healthcare, small-and medium-sized businesses ("SMBs") and International. As part of this strategy, we drove a reduction in volume from our largest customer, with a targeted reduction of 50% by June 2026 from 2024 levels. Partly as a result, we increased consolidated revenue per piece by 6.6%, and expanded SMB penetration to over 30% of total U.S. volume. In connection with this strategic execution of volume declines, we began our Network Reconfiguration

Overview In 2025, we continued to execute our Customer First, People Led and Innovation Driven strategy, which focuses on growing in the parts of the market that value our end-to-end solutions, including healthcare, small-and medium-sized businesses ("SMBs") and International. As part of this strategy, we drove a reduction in volume from our largest customer, with a targeted reduction of 50% by June 2026 from 2024 levels. Partly as a result, we increased consolidated revenue per piece by 6.6%, and expanded SMB penetration to over 30% of total U.S. volume. In connection with this strategic execution of volume declines, we began our Network Reconfiguration and Efficiency Reimagined initiatives.
